title: AppointmentProfile
description: Appointment profiles are for common kinds of appointments a doctor might have, such as "physical exam", which have a standard duration and should show up as the same color on the calendar.

archived.description: Indicates that the object has been soft-deleted and should not be used
archived.title: Archived

sort_order.description: Override the usual ordering ordering of appointments in the patient's appointments page. Lower values are shown at the top
sort_order.title: Sort order

duration.description: Length of an appointment in minutes
duration.title: Duration

online_scheduling.description: Whether this profile should be available for online scheduling
online_scheduling.title: Online scheduling
